pr_text:
## Title: Fix thread-safety issue in DLSCH buffer management

### Summary
The `nr_store_dlsch_buffer` function in the gNB MAC scheduler accesses shared scheduler state without proper synchronization, creating a race condition when multiple threads interact with UE scheduling control structures. The function iterates over the global UE list and modifies per-UE scheduling control fields (`num_total_bytes`, `dl_pdus_total`) without holding the scheduler lock, leading to potential data corruption un
